name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_SUCCESS
message: Operation is successful.
description: 图像处理操作成功。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER
message: Input parameter is invalid. This error is returned for all of the following error conditions: 1 - Invalid input or output image buffer - The image buffer is null. 2 - Invalid parameter - The parameter is null. 3 - Invalid type - The type passed in the create function does not exist.
description: 输入参数无效。可能原因：(1) 图像缓冲区为空；(2) 参数指针为空；(3) 创建实例时传入的类型不存在。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_UNKNOWN
message: Some unknown error occurred, such as GPU calculation failure or memcpy failure.
description: 发生未知错误。例如 GPU 计算失败或内存拷贝失败。处理步骤：检查资源是否已初始化，检查内存是否有效。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_INITIALIZE_FAILED
message: The global environment initialization for image processing failed, such as failure to initialize the GPU environment.
description: 图像处理全局环境初始化失败。例如 GPU 环境初始化失败。处理步骤：查看 log 是否有 GPU 异常上报。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_CREATE_FAILED
message: Failed to create image processing instance. For example, the number of instances exceeds the upper limit.
description: 创建图像处理实例失败。例如实例数量超出上限。处理步骤：减少创建实例的数目。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_PROCESS_FAILED
message: Failed to process image buffer. For example, the processing times out.
description: 处理图像缓冲区失败。例如处理超时。处理步骤：减小负载。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PROCESSING
message: The processing is not supported. You may call OH_ImageProcessing_IsXXXSupported to check whether the capability is supported.
description: 不支持该处理操作。建议调用 OH_ImageProcessing_IsXXXSupported 检查能力是否支持。处理步骤：检查 log 打印。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_OPERATION_NOT_PERMITTED
message: The operation is not permitted. This may be caused by incorrect status.
description: 操作不被允许。可能由于状态不正确。例如未调用 InitializeEnvironment 就调用 DeinitializeEnvironment，或尚有实例未销毁。处理步骤：检查 log 打印。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_NO_MEMORY
message: Out of memory.
description: 内存不足。处理步骤：减少内存申请。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_INVALID_INSTANCE
message: The image processing instance is invalid. This may be caused by null instance.
description: 图像处理实例无效。可能由于实例指针为空。处理步骤：检查实例的创建。

name: IMAGE_PROCESSING_ERROR_INVALID_VALUE
message: Input value is invalid. This error is returned for all of the following error conditions: 1 - Invalid input or output image buffer - The image buffer width(height) is too large or colorspace is incorrect. 2 - Invalid parameter - The parameter does not contain valid information, such as detail enhancer level is incorrect.
description: 输入值无效。可能原因：(1) 图像缓冲区宽高过大或色彩空间不正确；(2) 参数不包含有效信息（如细节增强档位不正确）。处理步骤：检查输入输出的分辨率和色彩空间，检查是否配置了算法档位。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_SUCCESS
message: Operation is successful.
description: 视频处理操作成功。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER
message: Input parameter is invalid. This error is returned for all of the following error conditions: 1 - Invalid input or output video buffer - The video buffer is null. 2 - Invalid parameter - The parameter is null. 3 - Invalid type - The type passed in the create function does not exist.
description: 输入参数无效。可能原因：(1) 视频缓冲区为空；(2) 参数指针为空；(3) 创建实例时传入的类型不存在。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_UNKNOWN
message: Some unknown error occurred, such as GPU calculation failure or memcpy failure.
description: 发生未知错误。例如 GPU 计算失败或内存拷贝失败。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_INITIALIZE_FAILED
message: The global environment initialization for video processing failed, such as failure to initialize the GPU environment.
description: 视频处理全局环境初始化失败。例如 GPU 环境初始化失败。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_CREATE_FAILED
message: Failed to create video processing instance. For example, the number of instances exceeds the upper limit.
description: 创建视频处理实例失败。例如实例数量超出上限。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_PROCESS_FAILED
message: Failed to process video buffer. For example, the processing times out.
description: 处理视频缓冲区失败。例如处理超时。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PROCESSING
message: The processing is not supported. You may call OH_VideoProcessing_IsXXXSupported to check whether the capability is supported.
description: 不支持该处理操作。建议调用 OH_VideoProcessing_IsXXXSupported 检查能力是否支持。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_OPERATION_NOT_PERMITTED
message: The operation is not permitted. This may be caused by incorrect status.
description: 操作不被允许。可能由于状态不正确。例如实例仍在运行时调用 Destroy，或未调用 InitializeEnvironment 就调用 DeinitializeEnvironment。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_NO_MEMORY
message: Out of memory.
description: 内存不足。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_INVALID_INSTANCE
message: The video processing instance is invalid. This may be caused by null instance.
description: 视频处理实例无效。可能由于实例指针为空。

name: VIDEO_PROCESSING_ERROR_INVALID_VALUE
message: Input value is invalid. This error is returned for all of the following error conditions: 1 - Invalid input or output video buffer - The video buffer width(height) is too large or colorspace is incorrect. 2 - Invalid parameter - The parameter does not contain valid information, such as detail enhancer level is incorrect.
description: 输入值无效。可能原因：(1) 视频缓冲区宽高过大或色彩空间不正确；(2) 参数不包含有效信息（如细节增强档位不正确）。

name: JS_ERROR_CAPABILITY_NOT_SUPPORTED
message: Capability not supported. Function XXX can not work correctly due to limited device capabilities.
description: 设备能力不支持。当设备不支持视频处理引擎功能时抛出。影响函数：create、initializeEnvironment、enhanceDetail、enhanceDetailSync。

name: JS_ERROR_INITIALIZE_FAILED
message: The global environment initialization for image processing failed, such as failure to initialize the GPU environment.
description: JS API 环境初始化失败。例如 GPU 环境初始化失败。由 initializeEnvironment() 抛出。

name: JS_ERROR_CREATE_FAILED
message: Failed to create image processing instance. For example, the number of instances exceeds the upper limit.
description: JS API 创建实例失败。例如实例数量超出上限。由 create() 抛出。

name: JS_ERROR_PROCESS_FAILED
message: Failed to process image buffer. For example, the processing times out.
description: JS API 处理失败。例如处理超时。由 enhanceDetailSync() 抛出。

name: JS_ERROR_OPERATION_NOT_PERMITTED
message: The operation is not permitted. This may be caused by incorrect status.
description: JS API 操作不被允许。可能由于状态不正确。由 initializeEnvironment() 和 deinitializeEnvironment() 抛出。

name: JS_ERROR_NO_MEMORY
message: Out of memory.
description: JS API 内存不足。由 create()、enhanceDetail()、enhanceDetailSync() 抛出。

name: JS_ERROR_INVALID_VALUE
message: Input value is invalid. This error is returned for all of the following error conditions: 1 - Invalid input or output image buffer - The image buffer width(height) is too large or colorspace is incorrect. 2 - Invalid parameter - The parameter does not contain valid information, such as detail enhancer level is incorrect.
description: JS API 输入值无效。可能原因：(1) 图像缓冲区宽高过大或色彩空间不正确；(2) 参数不包含有效信息（如细节增强档位不正确）。由 enhanceDetail() 和 enhanceDetailSync() 抛出。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_OK
message: Operation successful (ERR_OK).
description: 内部算法操作成功。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_NO_MEMORY
message: No memory.
description: 内部算法内存不足。错误码偏移基于 ENOMEM。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_INVALID_OPERATION
message: Operation not permitted.
description: 内部算法操作不被允许。错误码偏移基于 ENOSYS。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_INVALID_VAL
message: Invalid argument.
description: 内部算法参数无效。错误码偏移基于 EINVAL。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_UNKNOWN
message: Unknown error.
description: 内部算法未知错误。错误码偏移为 VPE_ALGO_ERR_OFFSET + 0x200。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_INIT_FAILED
message: Video processing engine init failed.
description: 内部算法初始化失败。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_EXTENSION_NOT_FOUND
message: Extension not found.
description: 内部算法插件未找到。Extension Manager 无法找到所需的算法插件。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_EXTENSION_INIT_FAILED
message: Extension init failed.
description: 内部算法插件初始化失败。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_EXTENSION_PROCESS_FAILED
message: Extension process failed.
description: 内部算法插件处理失败。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED
message: Extension is not implemented.
description: 内部算法插件未实现。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED
message: Not supported operation.
description: 内部算法不支持的操作。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_INVALID_STATE
message: The state does not support this operation.
description: 内部算法状态不支持当前操作。通常因状态机不正确（如在未初始化状态调用处理接口）。

name: VPE_ALGO_ERR_INVALID_PARAM
message: Invalid parameter.
description: 内部算法参数无效。
